claimText: Cornell's Center for Teaching Innovation recommends that faculty discuss course policies and expectations around the use of generative AI tools with their students and clearly communicate when and in what ways use of such tools is permitted or not.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: We recommend discussing course policies and expectations around their use, and clearly communicating with your students when and in what ways use of generative AI tools are permitted – or not.

citation.citationTitle: Generative Artificial Intelligence | Center for Teaching Innovation
